datasets.name: ds-p01
queryLines:
SELECT COUNT(o.stream_id) AS active_streams
FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_stream o
LEFT JOIN system.lakeflow.zerobus_stream c
  ON o.stream_id = c.stream_id AND c.closed_time IS NOT NULL
WHERE o.opened_time IS NOT NULL
  AND c.stream_id IS NULL
  AND (:p_table = 'All' OR o.table_name = :p_table)

datasets.name: ds-p04
queryLines:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT stream_id) AS error_streams
FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_stream
WHERE errors IS NOT NULL
  AND SIZE(errors) > 0
  AND event_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  AND (:p_table = 'All' OR table_name = :p_table)

datasets.name: ds-p05
queryLines:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT table_name) AS active_tables
FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_ingest
WHERE commit_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  AND (:p_table = 'All' OR table_name = :p_table)

datasets.name: ds-p06
queryLines:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', commit_time) AS hour,
       SUM(committed_records) AS records_ingested
FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_ingest
WHERE commit_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  AND (:p_table = 'All' OR table_name = :p_table)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

datasets.name: ds-p07
queryLines:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', commit_time) AS hour,
       SUM(committed_bytes) AS bytes_ingested
FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_ingest
WHERE commit_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  AND (:p_table = 'All' OR table_name = :p_table)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

datasets.name: ds-p08
queryLines:
SELECT table_name,
       DATE_TRUNC('hour', commit_time) AS hour,
       ROUND(SUM(committed_bytes) / 3600.0, 2) AS bytes_per_second,
       ROUND(SUM(committed_records) / 3600.0, 2) AS records_per_second
FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_ingest
WHERE commit_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOURS
  AND (:p_table = 'All' OR table_name = :p_table)
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 2 ASC, 3 DESC

datasets.name: ds-p09
queryLines:
SELECT hour, SUM(streams_opened) AS streams_opened, SUM(streams_closed) AS streams_closed
FROM (
  SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', opened_time) AS hour,
         COUNT(*) AS streams_opened, 0 AS streams_closed
  FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_stream
  WHERE opened_time IS NOT NULL AND opened_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  AND (:p_table = 'All' OR table_name = :p_table)
  GROUP BY 1
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', closed_time) AS hour,
         0 AS streams_opened, COUNT(*) AS streams_closed
  FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_stream
  WHERE closed_time IS NOT NULL AND closed_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  AND (:p_table = 'All' OR table_name = :p_table)
  GROUP BY 1
)
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

datasets.name: ds-p10
queryLines:
SELECT table_name,
       SUM(committed_records) AS total_records
FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_ingest
WHERE commit_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  AND (:p_table = 'All' OR table_name = :p_table)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY total_records DESC
LIMIT 10

datasets.name: ds-p11
queryLines:
SELECT table_name,
       SUM(committed_bytes) AS total_bytes
FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_ingest
WHERE commit_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  AND (:p_table = 'All' OR table_name = :p_table)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY total_bytes DESC
LIMIT 10

datasets.name: ds-p13
queryLines:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', event_time) AS hour,
       COUNT(*) AS total_events,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN SIZE(errors) > 0 THEN 1 END) AS error_events,
       ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN SIZE(errors) > 0 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS error_rate_pct
FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_stream
WHERE event_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  AND (:p_table = 'All' OR table_name = :p_table)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

datasets.name: ds-p14
queryLines:
SELECT e.error_code AS error_code,
       COUNT(*) AS occurrence_count
FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_stream
LATERAL VIEW EXPLODE(errors) t AS e
WHERE SIZE(errors) > 0
  AND event_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  AND (:p_table = 'All' OR table_name = :p_table)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 2 DESC

datasets.name: ds-p15
queryLines:
SELECT s.stream_id,
       s.table_name,
       s.event_time,
       e.error_code,
       e.error_message,
       e.timestamp AS error_timestamp
FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_stream s
LATERAL VIEW EXPLODE(s.errors) t AS e
WHERE SIZE(s.errors) > 0
  AND (:p_table = 'All' OR s.table_name = :p_table)
ORDER BY s.event_time DESC LIMIT 200

datasets.name: ds-p16
queryLines:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', commit_time) AS hour,
       COUNT(CASE WHEN SIZE(errors) > 0 THEN 1 END) AS batches_with_errors,
       COUNT(*) AS total_batches
FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_ingest
WHERE commit_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  AND (:p_table = 'All' OR table_name = :p_table)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

datasets.name: ds-p17
queryLines:
SELECT protocol,
       COUNT(DISTINCT stream_id) AS stream_count
FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_stream
WHERE opened_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  AND (:p_table = 'All' OR table_name = :p_table)
GROUP BY 1

datasets.name: ds-p18
queryLines:
SELECT data_format,
       COUNT(DISTINCT stream_id) AS stream_count
FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_stream
WHERE opened_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  AND (:p_table = 'All' OR table_name = :p_table)
GROUP BY 1

datasets.name: ds-p19
queryLines:
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN duration_seconds < 60    THEN '< 1 min'
    WHEN duration_seconds < 300   THEN '1-5 min'
    WHEN duration_seconds < 900   THEN '5-15 min'
    WHEN duration_seconds < 3600  THEN '15-60 min'
    WHEN duration_seconds < 14400 THEN '1-4 hr'
    ELSE '4+ hr'
  END AS duration_bucket,
  COUNT(*) AS stream_count,
  CASE
    WHEN duration_seconds < 60    THEN 1
    WHEN duration_seconds < 300   THEN 2
    WHEN duration_seconds < 900   THEN 3
    WHEN duration_seconds < 3600  THEN 4
    WHEN duration_seconds < 14400 THEN 5
    ELSE 6
  END AS sort_order
FROM (
  SELECT
    UNIX_TIMESTAMP(c.closed_time) - UNIX_TIMESTAMP(o.opened_time) AS duration_seconds
  FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_stream o
  JOIN system.lakeflow.zerobus_stream c
    ON o.stream_id = c.stream_id AND c.closed_time IS NOT NULL
  WHERE o.opened_time IS NOT NULL
    AND o.opened_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
    AND (:p_table = 'All' OR o.table_name = :p_table)
)
GROUP BY duration_bucket, sort_order
ORDER BY sort_order

datasets.name: ds-w1
queryLines:
SELECT SUM(committed_records) AS total_records_7d
FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_ingest
WHERE commit_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  AND (:p_table = 'All' OR table_name = :p_table)

datasets.name: ds-w2
queryLines:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(committed_bytes) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 2) AS total_gb_7d
FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_ingest
WHERE commit_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  AND (:p_table = 'All' OR table_name = :p_table)

datasets.name: ds-h1
queryLines:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS requests_last_hour
FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_ingest
WHERE commit_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR
  AND (:p_table = 'All' OR table_name = :p_table)

datasets.name: ds-h2
queryLines:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT stream_id) AS streams_last_hour
FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_stream
WHERE event_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR
  AND (:p_table = 'All' OR table_name = :p_table)

datasets.name: ds-h3
queryLines:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT table_name) AS active_tables_last_hour
FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_ingest
WHERE commit_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR
  AND (:p_table = 'All' OR table_name = :p_table)

datasets.name: ds-h4
queryLines:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(committed_bytes) / 1024.0 / 1024.0 / 1024.0, 3) AS gb_ingested_last_hour
FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_ingest
WHERE commit_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR
  AND (:p_table = 'All' OR table_name = :p_table)

datasets.name: ds-h5
queryLines:
SELECT SUM(committed_records) AS records_last_hour
FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_ingest
WHERE commit_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR
  AND (:p_table = 'All' OR table_name = :p_table)

datasets.name: ds-h6
queryLines:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT stream_id) AS error_streams_last_hour
FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_stream
WHERE errors IS NOT NULL
  AND SIZE(errors) > 0
  AND event_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR
  AND (:p_table = 'All' OR table_name = :p_table)

datasets.name: ds-filter-table
queryLines:
SELECT DISTINCT table_name AS full_table_name
FROM system.lakeflow.zerobus_ingest
WHERE commit_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
ORDER BY 1

frame.title: Streams Opened vs Closed Per Hour (7d)
